model_sheet.cancel_pending_warn: {{n}} pending tasks of this phase will be cancelled; the owner takes responsibility.

taller.pom_outside: Add a POM outside the sheet
taller.model_poms_empty: This model has no measurements on its sheet yet.
taller.sew_off: Off by {{desv}} cm · A {{a}} cm · B {{b}} cm
taller.cov_overlap: Overlap of {{cm}} cm — {{peca}}, edge {{vora}} ({{vora_cm}} cm long)
taller.cov_excess: Excess of {{cm}} cm — {{suma}} cm sewn onto a {{vora_cm}} cm edge ({{peca}}, edge {{vora}})
taller.segments_empty: No declared spans. The engine's segmentation is a proposal, not a declared edge.
taller.segment_in_use: {{n}} seam(s) use it ({{ids}}). Remove it from the seam first: deleting it now would silently leave the seam short.
taller.title: Pattern workshop
taller.no_file: This model has no pattern loaded.

pattern.empty_hint: Upload the pattern DXF (and the grading RUL, if you have one) to see it here.
pattern.no_sew_layer: The file has no sewing line (layer 14): cutting line only.
pattern.viewer_error: The pattern could not be drawn.
pattern.new_version_msg: There is already a pattern (v{{versio}}). The file you upload will become v{{seguent}}, chained to the current one. The previous version is not deleted: you can still reach it from the version selector.
pattern.err_load: Could not load the model's patterns.
pattern.err_too_big: The file exceeds the {{mb}} MB limit.
pattern.hover_hint: Hover over the pattern to see coordinates and segment lengths.
pattern.pom_hint_first: Click the first point of the measurement (the cursor snaps to the pattern's points).
pattern.pom_hint_second: Click the second point and pick which POM it is.
pattern.pom_search: Search a POM by code or name…
pattern.poms_empty: No POM anchored yet. Enter “Mark POM” mode to start.
pattern.err_task_not_allowed: Your profile is not allowed to run the “Pattern digitisation” task. Ask an administrator to add it to your allowed tasks.
pattern.err_pom_duplicate: This POM is already anchored to this piece: one measurement, one truth.
pattern.exp_subtitle: A DXF+RUL is generated, graded with an approved grading version. Check the table before acknowledging: what you see is what gets exported.
pattern.exp_only_approved: Only approved versions can be selected.
pattern.exp_no_approved: This model has no approved grading version. A nest is only generated from a signed grading.
pattern.exp_computing: Projecting the grading onto the geometry…
pattern.exp_table_hint: Value measured on the pattern (cm) and, below, the growth the grading dictates. The pattern value and the one declared on the spec sheet measure different things: they need not match.
pattern.exp_om_no_spec: anchored on the pattern but with no grading in this version: it does not move in any size.
pattern.exp_om_no_anchor: {{count}} POMs have grading but are not anchored to any point of the pattern: they move nothing.
pattern.exp_selfcheck_blocked: The export is blocked: the file does not read back the same as it was written.
pattern.exp_err_versions: Could not load the grading versions.
